name: Hawaiian Turkey Kebobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin each skewer with a cube of turkey.
2. Add pineapple to the skewer.
3. Add an onion piece to the skewer.
4. Add the green pepper and tomato to the skewer.
5. Repeat steps 2-4 for additional skewers.
6. Place the skewers in a baking pan.
7. Mix soy sauce, pineapple juice, curry powder, and ground ginger.
8. Pour the mixture over the kebobs.
9. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes, turning frequently to coat with sauce.
10. Serve on rice if desired.
Note:
1/4 recipe not including rice: 177 calories, 3 lean meat, 1/2 fruit, 1 vegetable exchange, 14 grams carbohydrate, 22 grams protein, 4 grams fat, 271 mg sodium, 453 mg potassium, 54 mg cholesterol.
My note: This is similar to a microwave diabetic recipe made with beef chunks and wooden (bamboo) skewers called Lean & Free Sirloin Kabobs. Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93.
